about.title: About Me
about.tagline: Crafting digital experiences with passion and precision
about.bio: I am a passionate Full Stack Developer with expertise in building modern web applications. My journey in software development has been driven by a constant desire to learn and create innovative solutions.
about.experience: With over {{years}} years of experience in full-stack development, I specialize in building exceptional digital experiences. My focus is on creating accessible, user-friendly applications that solve real-world problems.
about.passion: I'm passionate about staying at the forefront of technology trends and continuously expanding my skill set. When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open-source projects, or sharing my knowledge through technical articles and mentoring.

frontend.description: Building responsive and interactive user interfaces with modern frameworks and libraries.

backend.title: Backend Development
backend.description: Creating robust server-side applications and APIs to power web applications.

tools.description: Leveraging modern tools and technologies to streamline development workflows.
